summary: Tested all 13 requirements for the 16 Deadly Sins page enhancement. All checks passed: standalone route, 16 WHAT HAPPENS sections, exactly 4 AUTHORITY ENDING badges on correct sins, COPY LINK at bottom, urgency CTA, dual CTAs with correct routes, all 6 Gumroad URLs wired correctly on /compliance-library, and internal links from /standard and /auto-method.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 Deadly Sins enhancements verified: /16-deadly-sins route works standalone, 16 sin cards all have WHAT HAPPENS section, exactly 4 AUTHORITY ENDING badges on sins 02/05/12/16, COPY LINK button at bottom (Y~5553px), urgency CTA 'If you recognized two or more...', INITIATE GROUND 0 -> /ground-0-briefing, VIEW THE DOCUMENT SYSTEM -> /compliance-library. Compliance Library has all 6 Gumroad links wired: PKT-001 NewEntrantCompliancePacket, PKT-002 DrugAlcoholCompliancePacket, PKT-003 HOSDispatchCompliancePacket, PKT-004 Maintenance_UnitFilePacket, PKT-005 Insurance_Authority, Bundle NewCarrierDocumentSystem. /standard has 'See the 16 behaviors these guards block' link, /auto-method has 'View the 16 Deadly Sins' link.
